name: Frederick Chew

education.institution: Stanford University Graduate School of Business

work_experience.title: Naval Officer (various command and staff appointments)
work_experience.organization: Singapore Armed Forces (SAF) / Ministry of Defence (MINDEF)
work_experience.description: A Naval Officer by vocation, held various command and staff appointments including Commander of the Maritime Security Command and Fleet Commander. Achieved rank of Rear Admiral (RADM). Also served as Deputy Secretary (Technology) at MINDEF.

work_experience.title: Chief Executive Officer
work_experience.organization: Agency for Science, Technology and Research (A*STAR)
work_experience.description: First CEO in the history of A*STAR. Transformed the agency into an innovation powerhouse, advancing strategic capabilities and translating basic research into enterprise solutions. Led the agency through COVID-19 and digital shifts.

major_achievements.achievement: Awarded the SAF Overseas Scholarship and the prestigious Lee Kuan Yew Scholarship.
Became the first CEO in A*STAR's history, transforming the agency into an innovation powerhouse.
Advanced A*STAR's strategic capabilities, translating basic research into enterprise solutions amid COVID-19 and digital transformation.

biography_summary: Frederick Chew Chih Chiang is a Singaporean public sector leader who served as the first Chief Executive Officer of the Agency for Science, Technology and Research (A*STAR) from April 2019 to November 2024. A Rear Admiral (RADM) in the Singapore Armed Forces, he held various command and staff appointments in MINDEF and the SAF, including Commander of Maritime Security Command and Fleet Commander, and served as Deputy Secretary (Technology) at MINDEF. He is an SAF Overseas Scholar and recipient of the Lee Kuan Yew Scholarship and Fulbright Award. He holds a Master of Engineering from Imperial College London, a Master of Science from Stanford University, and a Bachelor of Technology (Honours) from the National University of Singapore. Under his leadership, A*STAR was transformed into an innovation powerhouse that translated basic research into enterprise solutions.

collection_meta.notes: Enriched with data from Straits Times, Business Times, MTI press release, A*STAR website, and LinkedIn. Full career history (SAF/MINDEF/A*STAR), education details, awards, and biography added.
